Rooms.title: Your Stay
Rooms.subtitle: Discover our minimalist rooms and suites, designed for ultimate relaxation and unobstructed views of the Aegean.

Experiences.title: Aegean Experiences
Experiences.subtitle: Discover our unique amenities, designed to elevate your senses against the backdrop of endless blue.
Experiences.dining_desc: Taste authentic Aegean cuisine with fresh local ingredients and sunset views.
Experiences.wellness_desc: Relax with geometric stone therapy and holistic treatments for rejuvenation.
Experiences.yachting_desc: Discover hidden coves and pristine beaches with our private fleet.
Experiences.wine_desc: Tour historical vineyards and taste rare varieties with our sommeliers.

Gallery.title: Visual History
Gallery.subtitle: Moments of absolute serenity. The geometry of architecture meets the Cycladic light.

Testimonials.title: Guest Reviews
Testimonials.subtitle: The experiences of our guests, captured against the backdrop of the endless Aegean blue.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: We are here to design your ideal stay together. Contact us for reservations or special requests.

Footer.description: The definition of Cycladic minimalist luxury. A sanctuary of peace in the deep blue of the Aegean.
Footer.newsletter_desc: Subscribe to receive exclusive offers and news.
